description: Acoustic quality evaluation protocol for NepTTS-Bench. Defines automated metrics, thresholds, and human calibration procedures for assessing synthesized speech quality. Designed to quantify signal fidelity, perceptual quality, and production readiness.

notes.usage: Run all automated metrics on every synthesized utterance. Use human MOS calibration on a stratified subset to validate automated scores. Run the same protocol on teacher (Gemini) output to establish a quality baseline.
notes.evaluation: A passing system must meet all 'pass' thresholds. Systems meeting only 'minimum' thresholds are flagged for review. Failures on any metric below 'minimum' disqualify the utterance.
notes.reference_standard: Thresholds calibrated against EBU R128 broadcast standards and published TTS benchmarks (Seed-TTS-Eval, LibriTTS-R).

dnsmos_p835.description: Microsoft DNSMOS P.835 — non-intrusive perceptual speech quality model predicting Mean Opinion Scores for overall quality (OVRL), speech signal quality (SIG), and background noise quality (BAK).

utmos.description: UTMOS — universal TTS MOS prediction model. Provides a single naturalness score correlated with human MOS ratings.

signal_to_noise_ratio.description: Signal-to-noise ratio measured on the speech signal. Higher values indicate cleaner audio.

loudness.description: Integrated loudness per EBU R128. Ensures consistent volume across utterances.

clipping.description: Percentage of audio samples at or exceeding the maximum amplitude. Indicates digital clipping artifacts.
clipping.measurement: Percentage of samples with |amplitude| >= 0.99 of max

silence_trimming.description: Maximum allowed leading and trailing silence. Excess silence wastes training data and indicates generation issues.
silence_trimming.measurement: Duration of leading/trailing segments below -40 dBFS

human_mos_calibration.description: Human listening test to validate automated metric scores and establish a perceptual quality baseline. Run on a stratified subset of generated utterances.
human_mos_calibration.sampling_strategy: Stratified by corpus layer (phonological core, conversational, edge cases, English) and by automated quality score quartile
human_mos_calibration.listener_requirements: Native Nepali speakers with self-reported normal hearing

teacher_baseline.description: Run the identical evaluation protocol on teacher model (Gemini Flash 2.5 TTS) output to quantify the quality gap between teacher and student.
procedure: Generate audio for the same 100-sample calibration subset using the teacher model
Run all automated metrics (DNSMOS, UTMOS, SNR, LUFS, clipping, silence)
Conduct human MOS evaluation with the same listener panel
Flag metrics where student falls more than 0.5 MOS or 10 dB below teacher

aggregate_reporting.description: How to report acoustic quality results across the full evaluation set.
aggregate_reporting.pass_rate: Percentage of utterances meeting all 'pass' thresholds
aggregate_reporting.minimum_rate: Percentage of utterances meeting all 'minimum' thresholds
